response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience and genuine craftsmanship instincts (TDD, testing tools, CI/CD), but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no developer-tools-team leadership at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work. The role explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years building developer tools for a large mobile platform — neither is evidenced. Workshop teaching and open-source founding don't substitute for managing engineers and owning a roadmap.
strengths: Deep, diverse engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling: test runners (Trial), assertion libs (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture — TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, teaching Selenium/refactoring dojos
concerns: No formal people-management experience or direct reports listed anywhere in the resume
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling at scale); Apple TV/iOS work was brief and product-level, not platform-level
No evidence of owning a team roadmap, performance reviews, or leading organizational change

key_factors.factor: No large-scale mobile platform tooling experience
